h123d8c4egfbffg48e2gb541g88de5ce41875: We're ready to head to your camp - are you?
hb96274f9g5f5cg49e2gb8cag4c0bee220179: A scout just reported - the goblins' leadership has been decimated. We might escape this place yet.
h0de346b8gd0b2g42fdg9926gf7c55cc997f5: And I hear you are the one to thank. I'm grateful.
hf3235598g1e28g47fcga0d0gb293cbef1a1b: I took a collection - from all of us. It isn't much, but you've earned it.
hae73e67dg8849g448bgb6a3gdd8c2c19bfd5: It's not enough, but it's all we have.
h40d4b84aga587g46a7g91c8gb54b6b4e3545: Halsin will likely want to thank you too, mind. He returned just a while ago.
he87bc5fagf0f7g4993g8bf7g586ad3a881e5: I believe he's catching up with Kagha. As for us...
h0851e6f5g0246g4c2dgb712g815dcd34d63d: No armies at our heels... amazing. We can finally leave.
h5cd285e8g18ffg4b49gaeb8g099bc8d4b918: But perhaps we need not speak of farewells. We'll join your camp tonight to celebrate, if you'll have us.
h88a89894gc172g46cegbd61g2d014e43fb3b: My people are ready to leave when you are.
h3905b4acgaf1dg4db8gb2eag28d2d8e382aa: It's quite a day for a reunions. Halsin has returned, too - and I expect he'll want to speak with you. As for us...
hb869ee69g00fdg436agb0f0g5b59ed46214c: Very good of you. Thank you.
hb6353e6bg2c4fg49aaga919gb05bad06574b: I didn't want this. It was supposed to be just Kagha... but thank you.
haf77db55g158cg4410g9e13g28916de511cf: The druids would have overwhelmed us, if not for you. You've proven yourself a fine warrior, and a better friend.
h91d73b36g0169g4ea2gbfe1g9d151b5490b1: You've done so much for us - and I have more yet to ask.
h824865c7g6ae8g407dgb231g9ed52240d18d: Let me guess - you want something.
h49fdd9beg114dg4bb3gb79fgfde64f84cbbd: You've bought us some time here. But the goblins are still massing out there.
ha6868595g2952g4f12gb830g3eac9851741d: Whatever it is, I'm not interested.
he4abfaf0g0283g4dc4g9fa5g309920443157: I assure you, it very much concerns you as well as us.
h874a685dg76e6g4408g930agfccc623caf8a: The goblins are still massing out there.
h4f661774gf459g4de6g8b8fg34ff07c62811: That was ugly work, but it was them or us.
h33c5b54bgdf8bg425bg987eg271f37e14391: I'm told the druids have stopped their damn chanting. What happened?
h715ed041g0922g4d53ga3begdb06719888cb: Truly? May Kelemvor judge her justly, then - I've seen hell, and it's too good for her.
ha231de55g5427g4e04g8f8cg96a74ef9fe7c: Thank you - we still have the goblins to contend with, but you've given us time to prepare.
h5684fbe9g2f1dg4703g8af0gc6fe3899fb60: I need to ensure my people make the most of it. But here - left over from my soldiering days.
h39f14e30g8254g4908g8359gd09cc7b0a034: It's sparse thanks for what you've done for us but, gods and goblins willing, I won't need it again.
hc71dc364ga192g4976gbebcg1d53e52893d2: If you can clear the road of goblins as you say, I'll ensure a reward is gathered for you.
h24191cb0g41d7g4305g976dgddf97ccbe205: It's sparse thanks for what you've done for us - and I'm afraid I have more yet to ask.
h35f56cb5g0d04g4eddgb7e1g2c3161d7d456: I'll ensure my people make the most of it. It pains me that I have nothing to give you in thanks.
h1d2e54efg5ebag40a0gbd12g0e22dbf536f6: But I'm gathering what I can from my people. A reward - because I have something else to ask of you.
h92d85252gd9adg4891g933dg91e39d8ee747: Truly? I'm sorry it had to come to this, but she left us with no choice.
h7cab3beagd6dfg4ea5g9b98g73cff595633c: Kagha's agreed to stop the ritual.
h951badf0ga685g4cd9g9bdbg169b27fccfa8: Truly? Ilmater's ashes, I never thought she would actually see reason. Too late for poor Arabella.
h62fa66c0gbe12g4998gbbd6g5dc07c8cfece: Truly? Ilmater's ashes, I never thought she would actually see reason.
h79a6dd19gb066g411fg9d14g4236116f7ae0: Time's up - I've been asked to escort you out of here.
h3b562d9fg9c46g44acga6adg215ce70ebdf8: Any word on... what we discussed? About Kagha?
h0196a06ag8f94g4d3cgb417gac9b48e8b80b: Removing her isn't the way. Better to face the goblins.
hb9e719c0g2a2eg4b75gb688gb474d6b081cd: These are civilians. Open battle would be a massacre.
h7bd600acg204bg4fd3gbd57g45ba9dda8b12: You can't let the druids force you out.
h99e2ee69g5078g4a43gbac7g0f4f05f50afd: So long as Kagha leads them, we'll never be safe here. If you're suggesting we remove her...
h24438045g695cg4a0agb2efg618005e6be39: Surely your people can fight off a few goblins.
hc677e2e5g02afg431egb424g0dca2c9ed653: Our time grows short. If Kagha won't abandon her madness then we'll have to try the road - goblins or no.
h0f284613gc5dcg4544g9182g1dbd29919188: Our time grows short. If Kagha won't abandon her madness then we'll have to try the road - goblins or no.
hcdc0d255ga902g40e1g962fgbb8a7a48f8d9: I've... already heard. Arabella. Nine summers old, and now she'll never see another.
h1b208397ga79cg4054g8e2fg7e8eef6ec35a: Because of druid 'law'. Every natural law demands I take up my sword, storm their lair and-
he311ecd4g7162g4fcegb0f3g965b1f6993d4: ... but no. That's what Kagha wants. To prove we are exactly what she says - a threat.
hd645e2cbg236fg40deg82b1g05e4c197c7af: I won't give her the satisfaction. I'll get my people clear of this - but on our terms.
h49ace9acgd116g449egada7g293a677d6f00: Your people need to leave. I can help.
h1fdb7fa9g7476g4889g815dg8197e292b91c: You saw what they did to Arabella for trying - a child.
hed442afeg4f8eg4865gab2ag1e7614f45fa4: It's Kagha's influence. Without her twisting things, I believe the druids might see sense.
heeb57e65gb33bg4021gb28bg8d727714f838: Then why don't you get rid of her?
hf68e7fd9gd2f0g4285g84e4g68fe941504d4: A thought I might have dismissed, before Arabella.
h41b84df6g3fe8g4fddg8766gefe1195111c2: But the druids would slaughter us - we'd have to get close to Kagha. Within striking distance.
h5afe15f0g3090g46b4gaad1g7b65f3899adf: I can't manage that... but they've already let you pass once.
h3bb94145g8b59g4430g91afge663064313e7: To see Kagha pay? Everything. You'll get your coin.
h5bdef574gf71ag49efg811cg233986d147a3: Just as soon as I know she's gone.
h9a1589b6g25a5g4d12g87c9g55f564da1192: To get these people to Baldur's Gate? Everything.
h25adb09aga1dbg47c4ga9e7g758ca81c2fb6: You're taking a risk for us - we'll see that you're rewarded.
hb3bf7561ge869g4cbfg9c38gcaa67e0ebd23: I'm still hoping Kagha can be swayed from this madness. But if not...
hb6c1f8d3g6d33g4bcegb4f8g8f3234eeb886: Leaders need to make tough decisions. We do what we must.
h54d1cdeeg8747g49b0gb76dg7971b6ecd0e9: If the issue is coin, I'll ensure you're well-rewarded.
h39217cbcg7460g4359g905eg953f973b86ec: But if you believe Kagha deserves your compassion after what she's done, there's nothing more to discuss.
ha7dab220g23adg4f45ga523gd874d54b92f1: It doesn't sit well with me either. But to get these people to safety, there's nothing I won't do.
hb833b03fg3dc7g483bg92d3g46f504d28bef: You'd be well-rewarded for the risk. But if that won't sway you, there's nothing more to discuss.
h8b8d3c4fg7756g49d2ga313gc6a7458d3e87: A low thought, but I'd be lying if I said I hadn't considered it.
h1e58dd4fg8776g4a1aga9ccgd959a4bba014: You need to cut your losses and run. I'll help.
hc7c0fb63g0640g42dagaa7bg9372cd16e6a8: I'm grateful - but there's still an army of goblins out there.
h036941e9g0afag4bedgae11g2efdc8894a60: I won't expose my people to that.
h7a1c947dgf19cg4157ga029g9f90bcc2ba09: Wyll - you had planned to find the goblin camp and kill their leaders.
h455bd4c6g3232g4b6dg91e0g220046d26e33: If that's the best chance of getting my people out of here, then we await your word.
h3266782dg9089g4745g8aaag1dacdb0e129b: Tell me... what do you know of the man they call the Blade of Frontiers?
h7879b7c7g188eg420egb0f3g52c48dff1bb0: The Blade's a legend - a monster hunter. He showed up just before you arrived.
h4f72af8fga09cg4853g9ba6g5f80a9716725: But even he advised against facing the goblins head on. He proposed another way.
h39d31ca6g2cc9g44a4g9676gb2e34acab4b7: He planned to infiltrate the goblin camp and kill the leaders. But, unfortunately, he was struck down himself first.
h56d64baeg869ag4184gbc67g38e74d825fb1: I saw you fight. You're clearly capable. Perhaps you'd take an interest where the Blade left off.
hb1a9efcage10ag4cf6g91e1g90b4800f9eb2: I'll see what I can do.
h10760908ge7a6g4469gafcfg6ffbc2aaf925: That depends - can you pay me?
h5e57bb3bgf57eg4b05gab4bgf3abb7067b46: I suppose so. We don't have much. But we'll scrape together whatever we can.
h2df4a94dga4fcg4bd6gbd81g2c745479946c: Of course. Everything we have. Anything we can give you, we will.
h2aa00681gf1edg4d37gb02cg5091464c595a: You'll find the Blade in the caves. He's training the children in some basics. Good thing, too. They may well have to put it to use.
h1a05c1cegfbfag4d2fgb6e4g14229e1fbd2b: We'll be ready to leave as soon as you give word.
h49cd8f90g091bg4363g9d7dgef6d6bcfe4b1: Don't bother. I'll do what I can.
h033b3f47g5becg4a44g8696gfbef196049a9: Everyone in this camp depends on it. Thank you.
h22b4d712ga052g44cfg8dafgd9d53d14aaef: I have other things to worry about.
hf42833c5g903ag44acg8cccg6147859c68ab: Please reconsider. The people in this camp need help. I can only take us so far.
hd646eb16g79a2g496ag8564g43e03b9a7cdb: We made a deal. Don't let me down.
hb5909db6gabddg49f1gb754ge4757f9a1360: I know you'll do the right thing.
h89b84ddfgd461g49d9g8397gee7e2f59ecbc: I don't have time. I need a healer - fast.
h0b90acdcgb91ag4871g8257gc52fb6107c91: If Nettie can't help you, you'll need to go to Baldur's Gate - and you'll face the same threats as us along the way.
h54c08860g5e32g4525g93ebgc42a7e513ab0: Kill the goblins, and you'll clear the way for yourself as well.
h1bdafbe1g0c71g4245g855dg86dd084c2e79: He believes the goblins will scatter if we kill their leaders - but he needs help.
ha2ab476ag5ad5g42a3gaebbgaeafe4e97a60: You've proven yourself a capable warrior. I'm sure he could use you.
h7d1d069cg8bf3g492dg93fdgd14df68430ed: He's training the children in some basics before we depart. Good thing, too. They may well have to put it to use.
h3ecfaea1gd745g4348gb3bag21f7e66f478e: The monster hunter? What about him?
hf087a8b0g4810g4bbbga302g268ffacbecf8: He showed up just before you arrived. His skills are legendary.
h0d333001g454dg433dgb35cgbf4e2671d16a: I met him in the caves.
ha0ef557ag44b8g425bg97cdgbc1695d7ccd5: What does he have to do with anything?
h90a974ddg0906g4146g800bg2e5aa64aa218: He's fought goblins before. Made quite a name for himself while he was at it. His skills are legendary.
h3a8ee1c4g592cg49f9g833bg9e8e82618578: I don't have time for stories.
hab565367gbda9g4be3gb9c9gdf85ae8073cb: The Blade is not just a story. He fought with us at the gate. His skills are legendary.
h13f47f7fg0826g44b5g86b1gd1d6d89b6f31: It seems like that might be our best hope, now.
h6545468dg1b24g4d9agbbb4g8073343174c1: Right as rain, Zevlor. Take out the bosses, and the entire heap topples.
ha48e1f97g9892g42bdgb75dg6501d2bff058: And my new friend here's got my back. Isn't that right?
h4db33d16g0f02g4541g8d34g35780acad556: Is this true? You'll help us?
h251d0394gc03cg4c10g9e50g5248a1c50aea: I hear that you've joined up with the Blade of Frontiers. Which means you've heard his plan.
h2ab96f80g24b6g4bffgb724g5e023897c676: He seems confident he can do it. I take it you intend to help him?
hadf01ddeg239cg4cddga3f2gb27ca9788b09: You saw what they were willing to do to a child just for trying.
had420431gec94g4089gb5c5g41fd23a43721: No. The druids are too powerful - we can't stand against them all.
h0bfc1f58g89dcg4b4ag9406g135f7e27eb38: Best of luck with that. This has nothing to do with me.
hc74404c4gc73eg4be6ga2a7g88f91a1948d0: Do not be so sure - Kagha won't spare you either, if it comes to it.
h1049aac1g0a7cg4b78gb417ge9dd737e6483: I can only hope you see that before it's too late.
h02d0f98cgf0a0g41d5gb90cg485d07846df5: No, you won't - I'm here to make sure you leave.
h48247895g1cddg4d4fga410g3d43ff01d518: So Kagha's twisted your mind as well.
hda519d7fg6e3cg4e82g88b0gd38a89439526: Please, just listen - sending us out there is a death sentence. But there is another way.
hd2368e61gcfd5g4055g82c7g345c767dc216: What do you know about the man they call the Blade of Frontiers?
h7f543b2bg435fg4b75g83dcg7880ea8d2911: I'm not interested. You'll go, or I'll force you.
hbc7d989fg819ag479cga72cgaf5a949478cf: Torm's truth. You really are her creature, aren't you?
hcfe81d4egd5e7g4526gba46g1c880280166e: No. You would send us to our deaths - I'm not going to let it happen.
h6fd2bc17gcebfg44e8gb713g95dfdc47b9e5: I'm not here to advise you. I'm here to make sure you leave.
h0d09d438g57e4g4251gbf13g95cc6e56e641: I heard what happened. Thank you for protecting the child.
h56f7e752g043dg4bb3g8e7bgd4ff3c13f527: If the druids are this far gone, then it's not just goblins we have to fear.
h1648889fg1210g4144gac5bg95ec96d23f5c: So we can risk violence here, or face it for certain on the road. Quite the choice, isn't it?
h62c02fe0gafcfg48fegba1dg7692b3a4d0bd: The Blade of Frontiers. An honour, no matter the circumstance.
hdc358b49g1f5bg45aeg8143gf40da5883bcf: Ah. I've already spoken to your traveling companion. Well met.
he9afa7cfg0689g4ad7gba57g9ea57da6c8f7: I'd advise you to settle your affairs here quickly.
h12bf17c0g8837g4048g857fg2fd4511eeada: Once the druids complete their ritual, we'll be sharing the road with goblins once again.
hc40b2ea2g013eg4eb6g82adg210c0748de1e: Unless you've reconsidered speaking to them for us? Kagha might listen to you.
h648d4c4bgd686g407agb965g5b8650af6000: Of course - you have your own business to attend to.
h9a715b2agdba2g465ega573gd462142d8a34: But if the druids won't abandon this ritual of theirs, it will be trouble - for all of us.
h607a5f96gd719g4d9dg9b87g9ea91c726438: I want to discuss something else.
ha504aa77g45afg4020g9b02g133c0f30d478: There's the First Druid Halsin. This is his grove. Was, I should say.
h472a7c99ga191g4ba5g82d1gd878d92cb3b9: He should've returned with the adventurers. Cowards left him behind.
hfef50a72gf23dg4d32g9ee1g08432c42fc98: Try his apprentice Nettie. You'll find her in the druid's circle.
he1efe94cgcbdag4452g9f14g502f020b436d: Forgive me for presuming, but I think you'll fit right in.
h56029dd8g58bdg47b9ga52dge9aba9c4b26e: What brings your people out into the wilds?
h447edb7cg91d3g4659g9ff9gfa6e7d404741: We're refugees from Elturel - we took shelter here after gnolls and goblins attacked us on the road.
h1db90421g51acg4850g8f02g0718922020df: We were bound for Baldur's Gate, and it was too late to turn back. Elturel had no place for tieflings after the Descent.
h57420ba1gbf8eg4ac9g874ag86acfdae9136: *'The Descent' - an infernal conspiracy that had seen the entire city of Elturel briefly dragged to the Hells.*
hb3f5c4fbg5897g46b6g8d5eg1d7bb1a1d319: If your people survived that, they'll survive anything.
h812ab357ga884g4715ga0e5g4a9851612d38: So I hoped. But we've lost so many already - and more will die if we're forced out again.
h62414e92gfda2g4ef9ga6dcg2ac3caf2ccf1: I'm surprised you haven't heard of it.
h2126aab9g8ebeg491egb665gd5d14ac5f18f: The High Overseer - our grand protector- signed a pact with devils. It dragged Elturel straight to hell..
h2989d47bg9356g4732gadb3g7df9dfe53447: Lucky for us a group of adventurers found a way to bring the city back.
hadf876beg00bag4d9eg89d1g7c947ed038d9: Afterwards, people looked at us and just saw 'devil-kin'. No different from the druids here, really.
h7e1c7deagf8dcg4886gad7ag6f15e6d04c14: Is there a place for tieflings anywhere?
h53be137ag18e1g4813g8002g12d03057ea2d: Hah - a fair point. We can only hope the citizens of Baldur's Gate are more open-minded.
h33ff97f8gf212g4d19g8387g0ffb1ff5ef9f: But we can't get there with those beasts blocking our path.
h4b9fc2a2ga979g4d9fg90e1gb3bdf807001f: Maybe your people should have stayed in Hell.
ha8b87240ge36dg4efcgae8fg2f43c43d7577: It seems you're of a mind with our hosts here. But their ritual will force you out, too.
hff96bbd8g89a6g409dga681g28a45fb36aac: Why did Halsin go with the adventurers?
h7f75d8b4g2706g4fe0g9edbg3997d9cf642a: Some artifact Aradin was hunting. I don't know any more than that - and don't want to.
habd3c4a8g60acg40c7g9a19g4aeff1b325a0: This grove is poorer for losing Halsin, but I have my own people's concerns to look to.
h783d184age082g4031ga2bcg07da74d0a3e3: Halsin's alive - he's being held captive by goblins.
h4263826dgd09bg4d3agbce5g200f2a9ddc91: Gods above. This is wonderful news, but... I've seen what goblins do to their captives.
h76e3127fg4606g47e1g87cagbb20d6e15a94: I wish we could ride to his rescue, but my people would just wind up slaughtered along with him.
h1130e1b8g3911g4bfegbf9dg5a878513ea8d: I'll... I'll pray for him. So long as the goblins hold the roads, I'm afraid it's all we can do.
h7180b074g8e42g48a4gb328gdd5f078f449b: I'm looking for the one called 'Zorru'.
h9755aba9g9040g46cag909cg45d60062a39d: I'm looking for a man named Zorru.
h4324f332g802ag4251gacc0gc1dea69c2c7b: You knocked Aradin clean out. And you helped drive the goblins back. Thank you.
h159e34bbg364bg41cdg8a73gede4225b5dd5: I've always suspected drow weren't nearly so heartless as surface-folk believe. Thank you for providing the proof.
h5ab42234g17e2g4072gb90egb304601930b5: Ah. You. Thank you. You stopped us from making a bad situation much worse.
hcac9780dg6127g4908g92f2g58ec1fefdaf0: The stories I was raised on don't equate drow with diplomacy - I'm glad to see they were baseless.
h5bc9fd51g49dag491bgbeddg8d25d0371ad8: You're the one who knocked my jaw out of joint.
h3b4b863cg29ddg414dgab10gfb274f6b0622: And yet you walk in here like it's your domain. Typical drow arrogance.
h987225fbgcbe7g4b1ag81d6g05e017750f16: Lucky for you, you seem to have spooked Aradin and his trash into leaving.
h2aa53ecag3e85g4242g91c9g80fc8b25d4c2: Raise your hand to one of us again, however, and every tiefling in this encampment will fall on you like a tide.
h1a9c478egdc1eg4f2ag8caag1bc3a59d3a92: Loose tongue, bruised jaw - perhaps they're related?
h2b858a46gab41g43dfg85fag796c8599749c: I'll survive a sore jaw. And you'll survive as long as you keep your hands to yourself.
h58c5e818gd271g487fgb038g1fc5993b989b: You helped us fight those goblins. Who are you?
h9d416e41g2e18g4394g9198ga93c1de8d011: It will be smart for both of us to make allies of enemies.
h725fd416g346cg4b01g9c33g323d69abfc67: Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
h60e6bc6age471g44e6gbc0eg26c8d94fcc79: This latest attack will only strengthen their resolve.
h010140ffgaac5g48a8ga44bgfa0db24156a8: I have no quarrel with druids.
h1c3dcf32g999eg4e1bgb73cgf9fa2b0c9fd4: There have been several attacks by different monsters. The druids blame us 'outsiders' for drawing them here. Nobody's welcome anymore.
hd9584020g442eg43a4gba18ga98b67657d34: They've started a ritual to cut the grove off from the world outside.
hb99c4ae0gab7eg4827ga678g87d7aef65c86: We can't stay, but we'll be slaughtered if we leave - we're no fighters.
h136f5bcbge4d8g4112g9f04g6851cc2b0dbe: This ritual - is there no way to convince the druids to stop it?
h487a8553g3d3bg484cgbdafga8b32587ec13: I've tried. Kagha - their new First Druid - won't see me.
hb3b14c03g21dfg41ebg83begd77a3d422399: You, though... I know it's not your business, but she owes you for saving this place.
h85f5594cg59d1g4731gbda9g4a3119bea4c6: Perhaps you could persuade her. For more time to prepare, if nothing else.
hb1ceaf87gbf68g4a9dga426g52d831aa842a: I'll see what I can do.
h0768feb0g1c66g4177gbaddgcc14dc4e6e8e: We'd owe you a great debt. If we're forced to leave now, more of my people will die.
h20e25279gc85dg4b6dg9fe8g5d3f9fc37839: You'll find the druids at the heart of the grove. Please - make them see sense, before more lives are lost.
hbc04e7bbg4b28g43d7gb657g393f44538077: Oh, and if it's of any concern... You're brave to walk around without hiding your heritage. I'll make sure everyone knows that you helped us at the gate.
h6a1d4a5fg371bg4f75gafe2gf22a3a61472c: You'll find the druids at the heart of the grove. Please - make them see sense.
h9a5f076cgba0eg46e9g93a8ge6e49a595bf6: Kagha's a piece of work. Let's see if your wit surpasses your might.
hfb0f9f12g02d8g46adg925egb20d57c78191: I think you should, yes. No harm in trying the diplomatic route.
he1898b70g242eg435dgb20dg4c1b244b9384: Let's not forget why we're here. No point in wasting precious time on a lost cause.
h849a54eega8bdg40b8gac1bg696889eb3b21: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
hd0fa3510gfb32g4014gaaf5gcb3030a81f8f: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
h35778b59gb28fg486eg9349ged67d68e66ac: |Here is what I think of you agreeing to talk to Kagha.|
hdf774057g082dg4df6g8e5age99bea8a3631: Bah. We've no time to offer aid to every whimpering pup.
h88e89626g5e00g4d7cga65eg3c02c2472fa8: I'm sorry. I've got my own problems.
h48991369g26eeg4f0agbe94ga0b66f5a3f4d: Turning your back on those in need? Maybe we'll get along after all.
hadfefd21g1e01g43d9gb2cfg3f527f11d846: I understand. I can only thank you for the help you've already given.
h93effd18g6881g49e7g9f94gd6938c7c9349: We're raised to fear the drow, but you've earned your place here. I'll make sure everyone here knows that.
had842036g316cg45aagaeeeg24736ba4f973: Just keep your fists to yourself, yes?
h92b64b26g9458g47c5ga796g8dc8713bb801: If you'll excuse me - I'd best get my people moving.
h10f9f8d5ge69bg4aaag8ce5gf2ffc8a826c3: These poor souls seek a champion - and you turn your back?
hfcbf897bg3bc5g48f1gac23gd55ca93007f4: We've our problems, granted, but there might be some merit in shutting down a local conflict, no?
h6755d0f9g2336g4112g97c7g1b066fc6a926: You chose well. We have enough burdens as it is without taking on more.
hae9bdd65g69e8g428ag9ae1ga7ae72a21932: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
hc29d4e05g8767g4399g8991g59ef867f69ee: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
h0e5b9b03gc586g42e4gbc4dgf143d5a0ec1d: |Reflect on player refusing to get involved and speak to Kagha|
ha2feecd5gc724g4c1bgb58ag5458c572c3d4: A rational choice. We mustn't stray from our path.
hc3212da2gdaf7g4493ga3e8g3024dc8e0e59: I have my own time concerns. I need a healer.
he7b384fdgc2cdg4fb0gba63gf037901e9a6d: You're wounded? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he went with those adventurers. It seems they left him behind.
h2de3967dg82b8g4b13ga2d5g75b3d4fa1996: If it's not too serious, you could try his apprentice Nettie. She's with the other druids, in the inner grove.
h6a5b91b0g0e9cg4927g9cc0g23f6dd47868f: They've withdrawn there to prepare this damn ritual of theirs.
hab5a81b0gef94g45e8g81c5ga0f6c55f8b46: I'll find her. And I'll speak to Kagha while I'm there.
h3ee7bef3gc7f9g4de8g8347g579273e5d6c0: Enough about the ritual. I have my own problems.
hbd28b650g47acg490egac4fgc52b9f4af7cf: You're wounded? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he didn't make it back from Aradin's expedition.
h83c05b9bg3046g4242ga9eag6a988229486d: What are you offering for my aid?
h3f4ff487g7797g4249g9c26gec1d38fd79fc: What little we have, we'll scrape together. It isn't coin we need - it's time.
h37f222edga356g4a9bg93edgc3e40bbf9bf8: We're refugees from Elturel - we took shelter here after goblins and gnolls attacked us on the road.
h1701016dg7eeag408bg9a54geacea3f64238: We were bound for Baldur's Gate, and it was too late to turn back. Elturel had no place for tieflings after the Descent.
h0a83ea27g6557g4473g977fg7328ed9dc2cf: I'm surprised you haven't heard of it.
h83ef588dg0164g454cgab9cgaacc5a103b78: The High Overseer - our grand protector- signed a pact with devils. It dragged Elturel straight to hell.
h1fedfa1ege53ag483fgbd86g5f7d09df6efa: Lucky for us a group of adventurers found a way to bring the city back.
h513e7a16g5687g4666gb88eg3444997e2373: Afterwards, people looked at us and just saw 'devil-kin'. No different from the druids here, really.
hfbe46cb5g1d0cg46f6gb577gc044174800da: *'The Descent' - an infernal conspiracy that had seen the entire city of Elturel briefly dragged to the Hells.*
h63413ecegcd49g4b6bgb8e7gf8aea3f4bacc: If your people survived that, they'll survive anything.
hf791ac58g9d08g4492g85f7g4f7382a579e6: So I hoped. But we've lost so many already - and more will die if we're forced out again.
ha3b49286g73beg4c60ga8b7gbc8f0bd66b8d: Is there a place for tieflings anywhere?
h7e277d56g9194g4c83g9eceg0ffb79fab153: Hah - a fair point. We can only hope the citizens of Baldur's Gate are more open-minded.
h114b1e6fg5cb3g4c76gb2a1g0d80107857a4: But we can't get there with those beasts blocking our path.
hdb28e452g809eg4390gb8adgbc426d18d55c: Maybe your people should have stayed in Hell.
h2d2f20ddg616bg4f85ga2f6g08a5c1c77df9: Thank you again for your help out there.
hef49ac13g49f4g4b87ga5feg41c7399fa63f: Why are they forcing you out?
h7267ce1eg7738g4572g9158g1311ff4559c7: I won't be staying long - I just need to find a healer.
h6a07edf9g3d3cg4780g86cag5cde5143206a: Those goblins - have there been many attacks like that?
hacb19e86g9e7fg43e9gad49g28a1ffa4328d: Right. Best not to stop here.
h30c28e3egbbb1g4d29gb5c7g1f6f145385c3: Not so fast. After what you did at the gate, I'd like to know who I've let inside these walls.
hffdd2801g7b77g41fcga383g4fa322a6b081: And so will you, if you ever interfere in my business again. That I promise you.
had1f0a9fg8dfcg4ffag8345g68896625cb93: Your help at the gate was appreciated.
hbb3bf611g3605g4babg837cg689bdcd0a13e: Never thought I'd say this to a drow, but... thank you. I'm Zevlor. And you're...?
hd254aea0gc5cfg42b5ga601g8ffc042624f1: Well met. Though I should warn you - visitors are no longer welcome in this grove.
ha44deee9gd4e4g4145gbb91gac3e9b1fb4dd: Right. I'd offer you supplies and sustenance by way of thanks, but I'm afraid there's little to spare.
he37426f1gf4fbg42a0g9b10g6c5f66b44a60: New here. What is this place?
hbe0404cbg2cffg47c5g9502gf2fdafcb1513: A druid's grove, dedicated to the Oak Father Silvanus. You'll find its keepers just as thorny, I fear.
h0ae6a2f1g350fg47fdg8507g5e38d387041f: Spare me your platitudes about my people. I don't need them.
hf001f3dage380g4dfegb322g241a9af72a27: I meant no insult. It's simply that yours are a people at war with themselves - I've never known them to care for outsiders.
heae89bfegba56g48ceg9750g720e239def19: I'm looking for the one called 'Zorru'.
h3e43e745g3d5cg48aag9330gddb458d71608: I'm looking for a man named Zorru.
h59fccab2g0fbdg4013g8ce7gb4afd9a6ae09: You'll find him in camp. What do you want with him?
h01a0b59egc1e2g4d94gb09ag96dc07756edd: That is between the two of us.
h336e65d7g877bg4c2bg88b7g3f2b1df1fc6e: You'll find him in the caves. But I warn you not to start trouble. There's already enough going.
h1029531cgb509g40adg8425g0f15115acdca: See that you don't distract him from his duties.
hce93dec3geaf6g4064gb3bdg7356aabe425d: He has seen others of my kind - I wish to know more.
h67801c60gfc13g45fcg8f77g18af362d51b5: I suppose that's between the two of you.
h59edf4dfgd699g4650g8681g9ef40c4ec991: You'll find him in the caves. But we won't stay here much longer.
hca820d0ag2620g4929gbe47g77757851aa7c: He encountered strange creatures nearby. I wish to know more.
h9bfcc006g13d4g4bcfg8e1agb196076f3774: Right. He's been going on about something of the sort.
